for f in $(find . -type f \( -name '*.cfg' -o -name '*.conf' -o -name '*.ini' -o -name 'Dockerfile*' -o -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.py' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.go' -o -name '*.c' -o -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.rs' -o -name '*.java' -o -name '*.php' -o -name '*.rb' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.txt' \) | head -50); do echo "=== $f ==="; cat "$f"; done | head -500; echo 'archive check'; find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -name '*.b64' -o -name '*.zip' -o -name '*.tar*' iter2: recursive batch read (black-box/source absent) archive check --- iter 3 bash --- $ python3 <<'PY' import requests, re, hashlib from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse base='http://127.0.0.1:9100' s=requests.Session() paths=['/','/robots.txt','/sitemap.xml','/api','/admin','/debug','/healthz','/login','/login.php','/search','/search.php','/profile','/profile.php','/users','/user','/account','/backup','/.git/HEAD'] seen=[] for p in paths: try: r=s.get(base+p,timeout=5,allow_redirects=False) ct=r.headers.get('content-type','') print(f'=== GET {p} -> {r.status_code} len={len(r.content)} sha={hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12]}') print('HEADERS:', {k:v for k,v in r.headers.items() if k.lower() in ['server','x-powered-by','set-cookie','location','content-type']}) txt=r.text[:1000] print(txt.replace('\n',' ')[:1000]) if 'html' in ct or p=='/': for m in re.findall(r'''(?:href|src|action)=["']([^"']+)''', r.text, re.I): u=urljoin(base+p,m); pr=urlparse(u) if pr.netloc=='127.0.0.1:9100': seen.append(pr.path+('?' + pr.query if pr.query else '')) except Exception as e: print('ERR',p,e) print('--- harvested links ---') for x in sorted(set(seen)): print(x) # fetch js harvested for x in sorted(set(seen)): if x.endswith('.js') or '.js?' in x: r=s.get(urljoin(base,x),timeout=5) print(f'=== JS {x} {r.status_code} len={len(r.content)}') print('\n'.join(re.findall(r'.{0,40}(?:php|/api|\?id=|fetch\(|XMLHttpRequest|\.action|axios|ajax).{0,80}', r.text, re.I))[:3000]) PY === GET / -> 200 len=957 sha=b565fb23ff8b HEADERS: {'server': 'uvicorn', 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8'} Login
